title: We want to keep your account safe
body1: In order to confirm your identity we need to ask for additional documentation. On the next screen, we’ll ask you to upload a photo of your
body2:
driver’s license
foreign passport
or another photo ID
body3: You can skip this step by going back and typing in your ID number instead.
action: Go back and enter an ID number
coLoadedTitle: We're sorry, we aren't able to show your DC SUN Bucks information
coLoadedBody1: You can go back to enter an ID number, or contact us if you need more help.
coLoadedBody2: If you’re not sure what to do, or you want to apply for DC SUN Bucks, we can help you find out if you need to apply for your child. Tap “Apply now” and enter your child’s information.
